tasks.subject: Task 0: Add llm_triage slot to ServicesConfig with ollama_* legacy aliases
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Schema-level rename from ollama_* to llm_*; add llm_triage slot; Pydantic AliasChoices keeps operators' existing services.yaml parsing for one release.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/core/config_store.py:332-365
- Modify: glados/core/config_store.py:707 (docstring)
- Modify: tests/test_config_defaults.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ServicesConfig exposes llm_interactive, llm_autonomy, llm_vision, llm_triage
- Each field aliases its old ollama_* name on read
- llm_triage.model defaults to llama-3.2-1b-instruct
- Save round-trip emits new key names
- 4 new tests pass (legacy alias, new keys, default triage, save format)
- Note: full suite intentionally red until Task 1

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_config_defaults.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/core/config_store.py", "tests/test_config_defaults.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_config_defaults.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["llm_triage slot in ServicesConfig", "ollama_* aliases still parse", "save emits llm_* keys", "3 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Migrate engine + webui call sites to services.llm_*
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sweep all svcs.ollama_* references in glados/ to svcs.llm_*; restore full suite to green.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/core/engine.py:164,193-230
- Modify: glados/webui/tts_ui.py:76,4565-4610
- Modify: tests/test_glados_services_override.py
- Modify: tests/test_glados_config_url_sync.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- grep returns ZERO svcs.ollama_* matches in glados/
- Engine reconciler logs reference services.llm_interactive etc.
- Existing tests verify same behaviour under new field names
- Full pytest suite green

**Verify:** `python -m pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/core/engine.py", "glados/webui/tts_ui.py", "tests/test_glados_services_override.py", "tests/test_glados_config_url_sync.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero svcs.ollama_* references in glados/", "engine logs use llm_* names", "existing tests updated", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add LLMConfig.for_slot() resolver to autonomy llm_client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Callers ask for slot by name; LLMConfig.for_slot('llm_triage') returns a built config from cfg.services. Unknown slot fast-fails.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/autonomy/llm_client.py
- Create: tests/test_llm_config_for_slot.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- for_slot resolves all four slots
- Unknown slot raises ValueError mentioning the slot name
- Existing LLMConfig() construction unchanged
- 5 new tests pass; full suite green

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_llm_config_for_slot.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/autonomy/llm_client.py", "tests/test_llm_config_for_slot.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_llm_config_for_slot.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["for_slot resolves 4 known slots", "unknown slot raises ValueError", "5 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Enforce MAX_AUTONOMY_USER_PROMPT_TOKENS budget in llm_call
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cap user_prompt at 8000 chars inside llm_call; truncate oldest content with [...truncated...] sentinel; emit WARNING log on truncation.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/autonomy/llm_client.py
- Create: tests/test_autonomy_llm_client_budget.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- MAX_AUTONOMY_USER_PROMPT_CHARS = 8000 module constant
- _truncate_user_prompt(prompt, budget) returns (text, truncated)
- llm_call calls helper before POST
- Truncation keeps last N chars + sentinel prefix
- WARNING log on truncation
- 6 new tests pass

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_autonomy_llm_client_budget.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/autonomy/llm_client.py", "tests/test_autonomy_llm_client_budget.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_autonomy_llm_client_budget.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MAX_AUTONOMY_USER_PROMPT_CHARS constant", "_truncate_user_prompt helper", "integrated into llm_call", "WARNING log on truncation", "6 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Route summarization + memory_writer callers to llm_triage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace cfg.service_model('ollama_autonomy') resolution in compact_messages, extract_facts, memory classifier and extractor with LLMConfig.for_slot('llm_triage').

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/autonomy/summarization.py:81,149
- Modify: glados/core/memory_writer.py:354,374
- Create: tests/test_summarization_uses_triage_slot.py
- Create: tests/test_memory_writer_uses_triage_slot.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All 4 call sites resolve via LLMConfig.for_slot('llm_triage')
- Patched-requests tests assert URL hit is the triage URL, not autonomy
- Full suite passes

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_summarization_uses_triage_slot.py tests/test_memory_writer_uses_triage_slot.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/autonomy/summarization.py", "glados/core/memory_writer.py", "tests/test_summarization_uses_triage_slot.py", "tests/test_memory_writer_uses_triage_slot.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_summarization_uses_triage_slot.py tests/test_memory_writer_uses_triage_slot.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 call sites use for_slot('llm_triage')", "requests.post URL is triage URL", "2 new test files pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Route Tier 2 disambiguator to llm_triage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tier 2 disambiguator's LLMConfig resolves via LLMConfig.for_slot('llm_triage') so per-utterance classification costs <500 ms instead of multi-second LLM thinking.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/intent/disambiguator.py:1974-1977 (and constructor)
- Modify: tests/test_disambiguator.py (fixture URL update if needed)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Disambiguator resolves config via LLMConfig.for_slot('llm_triage')
- Constructor still accepts model/url overrides for tests
- Boot-log message reads 'Tier 2 disambiguator ready; ollama=<llm_triage URL>'
- Existing disambiguator tests pass
- Full suite green

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/ -k disambiguator -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/intent/disambiguator.py", "tests/test_disambiguator.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/ -k disambiguator -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["disambiguator uses for_slot('llm_triage')", "override path works", "boot log reflects new URL", "disambiguator tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: WebUI Services tab — labels + llm_triage card
tasks.description:
**Goal:** System → Services tab renders 4 LLM cards (Interactive / Autonomy / Triage / Vision); operator can change triage model without raw YAML edit.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js (Services renderer)
- Modify: glados/webui/tts_ui.py (slot allow-list if explicit)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 4 LLM cards render with status dot + URL + model dropdown
- Card labels: 'LLM (Interactive)' / '(Autonomy)' / '(Triage)' / '(Vision)'
- Save round-trip preserves llm_triage in services.yaml
- Save handler accepts llm_triage slot key

**Verify:** Manual visual verification + `ssh ... grep llm_triage services.yaml` after save

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.js", "glados/webui/tts_ui.py"], "verifyCommand": "echo 'manual visual + curl /api/services'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 cards render", "new labels in place", "triage save round-trip works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Live verification + docs update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Deploy via _local_deploy.py, validate in browser, refresh SESSION_STATE.md and CHANGES.md.

**Files:**
- Modify: C:\src\SESSION_STATE.md
- Modify: docs/CHANGES.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- _local_deploy.py completes; container healthy
- Llama-3.2-1B loaded on AIBox at ctx=8192
- 5-min log observation: NO 'Context size has been exceeded' for autonomy
- WebUI chitchat round-trip <5 s
- Tier 2 disambiguator hits triage URL
- CHANGES.md gains autonomy-triage-split entry
- SESSION_STATE.md top section updated

**Verify:** `ssh root@$HOST 'docker logs glados --since 5m | grep -E "exceeded|truncated|triage"'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["C:\\src\\SESSION_STATE.md", "docs/CHANGES.md"], "verifyCommand": "ssh root@$GLADOS_SSH_HOST 'docker logs glados --since 5m 2>&1 | grep -E \"exceeded|truncated|triage|Tier 2\"'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deploy healthy", "Llama-3.2-1B loaded", "no ctx-exceeded errors", "chitchat <5s", "docs updated"]}
```
